MSTR.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning Strategy Stock In The Last 5 Years

macro_events.event_summary: A massive Friday selloff wiped out $1.8 trillion from the S&P 500 and produced the Nasdaq's largest point drop on record.
primary_drivers: Risk-off rotation out of equities into safe havens
Volatility spike driving demand for hedges and vol products
De-grossing/forced deleveraging pressure on the most crowded/highest-beta names

losers.rationale: Largest single contributor to Nasdaq point moves given mega-cap weight and highest beta among megacaps; record Nasdaq point drops are almost always NVDA-led and de-grossing in semis tends to persist for days.
Crypto-proxy equity with extreme beta to risk sentiment; record Nasdaq drops typically coincide with bitcoin liquidations, compounding MSTR's NAV-premium compression.
Crypto exchange — revenue tied to crypto volumes and prices, which historically sell off in sympathy with record equity risk-off moves; high-beta de-grossing target.

headlines: S&P 500 sees $1.8 trillion wipeout, Nasdaq tallies biggest point drop on record: What investors need to know about Friday’s selloff
